title: As sitting judge I would've declined Adhivakta Parishad invitation due to its political inclination: Retired Justice AS Oka
description: Former Supreme Court Justice Abhay S Oka on Wednesday said that while serving as a judge, he would have declined invitations to speak at events organised by the Adhivakta Parishad due to what he described as its political inclination.He explained that judges are bound by several constraints to preserve institutional neutrality and public confidence in the justice delivery system.“For example, if as a sitting judge, I was invited by Adhivakta Parishad to speak on its platform, I would have polite
